---
title: Citing Ammonyte
sidebar: get-started
---

If you use Ammonyte in your research, please cite the following paper:

Niati, M., James, A., Emile-Geay, J., & Khider, D. (2026). *Ammonyte: A Python Package for Multi-Method Detection of Transitions in Paleoclimate Time Series*. Journal of Open Source Software. <https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX>

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{niati2026ammonyte,
  author  = {Niati, Maryam and James, Alexander and Emile-Geay, Julien and Khider, Deborah},
  title   = {Ammonyte: A Python Package for Multi-Method Detection of Transitions in Paleoclimate Time Series},
  journal = {Journal of Open Source Software},
  year    = {2026},
  doi     = {10.5281/zenodo.XXXXXXX},
  url     = {https://github.com/LinkedEarth/Ammonyte}
}
```

## CITATION.cff

A `CITATION.cff` file is included at the root of the repository, which is automatically recognized by GitHub and Zenodo.
